title: Notice of intersection: Closure at Louis Fourie road and Gericke Street
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The seaside leg of Gericke...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The seaside leg of Gericke Street Intersection with Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction from 21 May to 7 June 2025 (weather permitting). Alternative routes are via the new Gericke Link Road and Vlei Road.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The seaside leg of Gericke Street Intersection with Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction from 21 May to 7 June 2025 (weather permitting). Alternative routes are via the new Gericke Link Road and Vlei Road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience while we upgrade the intersection.","html":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience while we upgrade the intersection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. FOR YOU.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
